message:
bd-1hbnc: Anytime-valid restart storm detection via e-processes

Add RestartStormMonitor that accumulates evidence against the null
hypothesis ("restarts occur at the expected rate") using multiplicative
likelihood ratios. When the e-value exceeds 1/α, a storm is detected
with guaranteed Type-I error ≤ α regardless of stopping time (Ville's
inequality).

Includes StormMonitorConfig, StormMonitorSnapshot, observe_from_window
integration with RestartIntensityWindow, and 12 deterministic tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
